description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender black metal pole with subtle ornamental ridges and a flared, rounded base for stability. At the top, a single lantern-style lamp head is encased in a clear, slightly domed glass housing, capped with a decorative finial. The lamp head is octagonal and framed with black metal, evoking a classic Victorian or Edwardian streetlight aesthetic. The post itself is segmented with gentle fluting and banded details, adding to its traditional charm. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban streets, parks, or historic neighborhoods. No signage, banners, or additional attachments are visible on the structure.
description: A tall, black, classic-style lamppost with a single lantern head and subtle ornamental details, featuring a flared base and clear glass lamp housing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height, ornate base, and the lantern head with its decorative finial clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, emphasizing the slender profile and the symmetry of the lamp head.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the same ornamental details and lamp head visible, showing no attachments or signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the uniform cylindrical pole and the classic lantern head.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Octagonal lantern-style head with clear glass panels and a decorative finial, reminiscent of Victorian streetlights.
